---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What you want**
Describe the feature and what it would let you do.

**Why**
What problem does it solve, or what does it make easier?

**Anything else**
Mockups, examples from other tools, or details that help. Keep in mind Quobi
runs fully on-device, so anything that needs a server or sends data off the
machine is out of scope.
